Card had 4 duplicate Observer source links. Removing so the

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: populate RequestLog WHO fields eagerly in RequireRole

Move RequestLogFrom to the top of RequireRole so org_id and user_id
are written to the per-request log as soon as each value is resolved,
rather than only on the success path. This means failed requests
(bad org_id, unauthorized user, membership not found) now carry
maximum identity context in the http.request log entry, making
incident debugging easier.

Also captures org_id from URL during DEV_BYPASS_RBAC so bypass
requests appear with org context in logs.

commit.message:
fix: address v2 audit findings (HMAC signing, policy rights, honest stubs)

Critical:
- CP→tool gateway calls now HMAC-signed (new hmac-fetch.ts utility)
- Admin token comparison uses timingSafeEqual (was vulnerable to timing)

High:
- Policy engine validates requestor.right against tier required_right
- TTL now checks issued_at timestamp, not just > 0
- /status/:action_id now correctly searches by action_id (was receipt_id)
- Removed fake citation "KB-001" from analyze — honest stub with stub: true
- e2e-test.sh signs tool gateway calls with HMAC (was plain curl)

Medium:
- GLPI adapter fetches requester name via /User/{id}
- GLPI adapter fetches linked assets via /Item_Ticket
- GLPI adapter computes ticket_hash (SHA256 of title+content)
- Deleted zeroclaw/ directory from disk (ca-bundle.pem already in infra/)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

세션 상세 실제 운동 기록 카드, 워크아웃 구성 개선, 플랜 생성 주당 훈련일수 추가

- 세션 상세: placeholder → 실제 운동 기록 카드 (거리/시간/페이스/심박수 + 목표 달성률)
- 워크아웃 구성: 템포런 main 구간 추가, 인터벌 상세 구조(warmup/intervals/cooldown)
- LLM 프롬프트: 템포/인터벌 세션 workout_detail 상세 스키마 및 거리 합계 규칙
- 워크아웃 구성 카드를 목표 카드 바로 아래로 이동
- 페이스 /km/km 이중 표시 버그 수정 (_formatPace 정규화)
- 인터벌/반복 세션 목표 카드에서 단일 페이스 행 숨김
- 워크아웃 구성 없는 세션(이지런 등)에서 빈 카드 미표시
- 플랜 생성 화면에 주당 훈련일수 DaySelector 추가
- Phase 6에 플랜 관리 기능(삭제/취소/완료) 작업 항목 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Broaden positioning from guitar-specific to universal audio processor

Rewrite all pages to cover guitars, bass, keyboards, synths, vocals,
podcasters, audiophiles, and sound designers. Update descriptions,
use cases, and remove guitar-specific language from privacy policy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update rules and fix DEV_BYPASS_RBAC zero-UUID bug

Distill recurring issues from post-commit analysis reports into
actionable coding rules and fix the one live bug found in the process.

**Docs (.claude/rules/ + CLAUDE.md)**
- architecture.md: add Pagination requirement, SSE header-before-error
  pattern, DEV_BYPASS_RBAC contract, HTMX swap alignment, safe hx-vals,
  CSS/CDN SRI guidance, url.Values requirement
- go-patterns.md: add integer path param → BadRequestError mapping,
  json.Marshal error handling, url.Values for query strings, typed
  APIClient request/response structs, slug regex consistency, SDK paths
- testing.md: add specific status code assertions, loop-variable mutation
  anti-pattern, t.Setenv parallelism rule, template helper testing table,
  partial handler test requirement, build artifact hygiene
- tdd.md: add DO/DON'T items matching the above, Coverage Gaps table,
  PR checklist additions
- CLAUDE.md: Known Pitfalls table, DEV_BYPASS_RBAC dev setup notes,
  HTMX swap rules, template helper testing note, SDK clarifications

**Bug fix (rbac.go + cmd/main.go)**
- DEV_BYPASS_RBAC bypass now injects both RoleOwner AND devBypassUserID
  into context; previously only role was set, causing GetUserID(ctx) to
  return uuid.UUID{},false for all bypassed requests — silently producing
  zero UUIDs in any handler that calls GetUserID for logging or filtering
- Added startup Warn log when DEV_BYPASS_RBAC=true so the bypass is
  visible in container logs and impossible to overlook

**Test (rbac_test.go)**
- TestDevBypassInjectsSyntheticUserID: verifies GetUserID returns the
  well-known dev UUID with ok=true when bypass is active

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: hard typecheck/test gate with retry in Claude workflow (#230)

* fix: add hard typecheck/test gate with retry in Claude workflow

Claude Code Action often ignores CLAUDE.md instructions to run typecheck
before committing, leading to broken code being pushed and infinite
retry loops from the watcher.

Changes:
- Block `git push` from Claude's allowed tools — push only happens
  after verification passes in a dedicated step
- After Claude finishes, run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm test`
- If either fails, call Claude Code Action again with `direct_prompt`
  containing explicit fix instructions (same VM, same filesystem)
- Final verification gate: if code still fails, nothing gets pushed
- All post-Claude steps (push, PR creation, auto-merge, thread
  resolution) are gated on `steps.final-verify.outputs.pass == 'true'`

Flow: Claude runs → verify → fix if needed → verify again → push only if clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: bump verify+fix loop to 3 attempts for typecheck and tests

Each check (typecheck, tests) now gets up to 3 fix attempts before
giving up. If all 3 fail, code is NOT pushed.

Flow per workflow run:
- Claude main session (100 turns)
- Typecheck: verify → fix → verify → fix → verify → fix (3 rounds)
- Tests: verify → fix → verify → fix → verify → fix (3 rounds)
- Final verification gate
- Push only if everything passes

Up to 7 Claude sessions per workflow run (1 main + 3 typecheck + 3 test),
but most runs will only use 1-2 (if Claude writes clean code initially).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix pipe_close double-free and enable pipe tests on m68k

pipe_close() called file_free(f), but fd_free() also calls file_free()
when refcnt reaches 0 — a double-free that corrupted the kmem file
pool.  On m68k this clobbered the pipe read-end file object (EBADF);
on ARM it leaked file pool entries (eventual ENOMEM).

Remove the redundant file_free() from pipe_close, matching the
convention already used by vfs_file_close.  Enable pipe sections 2
and 3 on m68k now that they pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add level 3 thematic/setting clues for all 50 shows (300 rows)

New "Thematic / Setting" clues fill the gap created by shifting
levels 3→4 and 4→5. Each show gets 6 level 3 clues covering era,
setting, plot themes, and tone that narrow to a handful of shows.

Fixed swapped columns on Phantom of the Opera line 54.

commit.message:
feat: migrate automations to n8n — simplify CRM to UI + API

Move all 5 automation modules (auto-tasks, sequences, campagnes,
rapport-hebdo, prescripteur-tracking) from TypeScript cron jobs to
n8n Cloud workflows. The CRM now serves as the interface + API layer
while n8n handles all scheduling and orchestration.

Changes:
- Add 5 new API routes for n8n (/clients/sans-interaction,
  /prescripteurs/inactifs, /dirigeants/couverture-incomplete,
  /deals/mark-lost, /campagnes/clients-cibles)
- Add task deduplication to POST /api/n8n/taches
- Create 6 importable n8n workflow JSONs in n8n-workflows/
- Relocate UI-used functions to src/lib/ (prescripteurs, sequences, constants)
- Remove src/lib/automation/ directory (939 lines deleted)
- Remove 4 cron routes (keep email sync only)
- Remove vercel.json (no longer on Vercel)
- Simplify email sync: remove auto-analysis loop (n8n handles via webhook)
- Simplify cron scheduler: keep only email sync job

commit.message:
feat: implement US-008 HEAD chunk apply (>>) and discard (x) buttons

Add >> and x action buttons to each conflict segment in the HEAD column.
>> replaces the conflict placeholder in Monaco with HEAD content via
findMatches/executeEdits. x marks the conflict as discarded without
modifying the result. Handled conflicts are visually dimmed with buttons
hidden. Conflict state tracking (statiConflitti) supports future US-009.
Includes 16 unit tests and E2E scaffold.

GSAP's fromTo sets opacity:0 inline initially; without explicit
pointer-events management the buttons could remain unresponsive if
the tween was interrupted or staggered. Now sets pointer-events:none
during animation and restores auto on complete.

Also fixes dl-btn canvas still rendering 'SAMIK' → 'BOCHYA'.

commit.message:
fix: security hardening — DNS rebinding, header filtering, password strength, memory wiping

SEC-001 (High): SSRF DNS rebinding — custom DialContext on proxy transport validates
resolved IPs at connect time, preventing TOCTOU between service creation and proxy use.

SEC-002 (High): Unbounded refreshLocks — service name validation (1-128 chars,
alphanumeric/hyphens/dots/underscores) and cleanup on service deletion.

SEC-003 (Medium): Upstream response header filtering — blocks Set-Cookie, CORS,
CSP, and other security-sensitive headers from upstream responses.

SEC-004 (Medium): Password strength — enforces 12-char minimum on vault creation.

SEC-005 (Medium): Memory wiping — zeroes auth structs, file data, and intermediate
plaintext buffers on Lock() and after save/unlock operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: redesign logging with unified 5W1H structured schema

Replace ad-hoc logger calls with a consistent 5W1H (Who-What-When-
Where-Why-How) schema across every log emission in the API.

## Design

Every log entry maps fields to five dimensions:

  who:   user_id, org_id, auth (bearer|apikey|bypass), ip
  what:  action (e.g. "GET /organizations/{org_slug}")
  when:  duration_ms
  where: layer (http|middleware|handler|startup), component
  why:   outcome (success|client_error|server_error), status/error
  how:   method, path, route, request_id, user_agent, query

## Key changes

- `apps/pkgs/logger`: Add RequestLog mutable pointer stored in context.
  Each middleware layer writes WHO fields (user_id, org_id, auth_method)
  onto the same pointer; the HTTP Logger reads them after the request
  completes — zero mutex needed, one pointer per request.

- `middleware/logger.go`: Pre-creates chi RouteContext so chi fills in
  the route pattern in-place, giving cardinality-safe action labels
  (e.g. "/organizations/{org_slug}" not "/organizations/acme-corp").
  Emits a single "http.request" entry with all 5W1H groups as nested
  JSON. Adds outcomeFromStatus and stripAPIPrefix helpers.

- `middleware/bearer_auth.go`: Sets rl.AuthMethod = "bearer" on success;
  structured "auth.token_validation_failed" error log with where/why/how.

- `middleware/apikey.go`: Sets rl.AuthMethod = "apikey" and rl.OrgID on
  success; structured error logs for lookup failure (ERROR) and
  last_used update failure (WARN, best-effort).

- `middleware/rbac.go`: Sets rl.UserID, rl.OrgID, rl.AuthMethod="bypass"
  on success/bypass; structured "rbac.membership_lookup_failed" with
  who/where/why/how.

- `cmd/main.go`: All lifecycle events use dot-notation event names
  (server.start, server.shutdown, db.connect_failed, cache.enabled, etc.)
  with where/why slog.Group fields.

## Tests added

- logger_test.go: TestOutcomeFromStatus, TestStripAPIPrefix,
  TestLogger_RequestLogPropagation
- apps/pkgs/logger/logger_test.go: TestNewRequestLog, TestRequestLogFrom,
  TestRequestLog_SharedPointer (proves pointer-in-context mutation pattern)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lazy-start PHP session only when needed for login override

session_start() was running unconditionally on every page load, setting a
PHPSESSID cookie that prevents page caching for all visitors. Now only
starts a session in the three methods that actually use $_SESSION.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add IDS module: UNSW-NB15 dataset pipeline, thermometer encoder, baselines

Phase A1-A2 of network IDS pivot:
- ids/encoder.py: ThermometerEncoder with linear, gaussian, and distributive
  strategies for converting continuous features to binary RAM inputs
- ids/dataset.py: UNSW-NB15 loader producing binary-encoded train/test splits
  (175K/82K rows, 34 features → 257 binary bits at 8 bits/feature)
- ids/baselines.py: RF and XGBoost baselines on both raw and encoded features
- explore_unsw_nb15.py: Dataset exploration script
- .gitignore: Uncomment data/ exclusion for dataset files

Baseline results (UNSW-NB15 binary, thermometer-encoded):
  RF:     85.57% acc, 28.26% FPR
  XGBoost: 83.52% acc, 34.68% FPR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix build: upgrade Clerk, remove broken auth, lazy-load Convex

Build was failing due to:
1. Clerk v6.37 incompatible with Next.js 16 Turbopack (@clerk/backend/internal)
2. AI API route importing Clerk server auth (disabled anyway)
3. Convex client instantiated at build time without env vars

Fixes:
- Upgrade @clerk/nextjs to latest (v6.38+) for Turbopack compat
- Remove Clerk auth from /api/ai route (auth is disabled)
- Lazy-load ConvexHttpClient in /api/generate-report
- Fix UserButton prop change (afterSignOutUrl removed)

Build now succeeds: all 13 routes compile cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Major accuracy upgrade: 2026 AI detection knowledge + consensus scoring

- Switch back to claude-sonnet-4-6 (haiku was losing too many subtle signals)
- Completely rewrite image prompt: Flux/MJ v7/DALL-E 3 specific artifacts,
  biological signals, lens forensics, composition analysis
- Completely rewrite video prompt: Sora/Kling/Runway/HunyuanVideo/Pika signatures,
  biological motion (breathing, micro-tremors, eye movement), physics analysis
- Temporal diff: higher resolution (480x854), compute mean/std statistics per diff
  and pass as numeric context to Claude (mean <3 = suspicious near-zero = AI signal)
- Consensus scoring: if 2+ detectors agree (>=50%), add +6-12 confidence boost
- Video prompt now references 2026 generator-specific tells by name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix session persistence and enhance UI design

Session fix:
- Auth callback now sets cookies directly on redirect response object
  instead of relying on cookies() API which doesn't carry over to redirects
- Middleware now copies auth cookies to all redirect responses via
  redirectWithCookies helper, preventing session loss on navigation

Design enhancements (Remotion-inspired):
- Sidebar nav items with 3D border/shadow effects on hover and active state
- Dashboard cards with elevation shadows and hover transitions
- Upload card as primary CTA with arrow animation
- Search bar with bordered input style
- Bolder typography throughout (font-black, tighter tracking)
- Header with backdrop blur effect
- User footer with bordered card style

Adds NO_PAYMENT to PaymentMethod enum, markNoPayment service function,

reconciling zero-amount invoices, credits, and similar without payment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-reload on stale asset errors after deployments (#172)

When a new deployment creates new hashed asset filenames, users with
cached service workers see "Unable to preload CSS" errors. The
ErrorBoundary now detects chunk/CSS load failures and auto-reloads
once (with a 60s cooldown to prevent loops). If auto-reload doesn't
fix it, shows a friendly "App Updated" message with a Reload button
instead of a generic error.

than silently showing their state.

commit.message:
6단계: 학부모/학생 포털 결제 현황 페이지 추가

학부모 포털:
- child_payments: 자녀별 청구서 목록 + 이월·무료 조정 이력 (기간/주기/할인/차감/최종금/상태)
- all_payments: 전체 자녀 청구서 요약 카드 + 통합 청구 내역표
  (기존 calculate_tuition_amount 방식 → 새 Payment 모델 기반으로 전면 재작성)

학생 포털:
- my_payments 신규 라우트: GET /student/payments
- my_payments.html: 청구서 목록 + 이월·무료 이력 + 미납 안내 배너
- base.html 사이드바: 학습 메뉴에 '💳 결제 현황' 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tape display: use local score when server returns stale data

The previous fix derived the "Collected X/5" text from tapeResult,
which made things worse — stale server data now contaminated both
the text AND the tape display. Reverted text to use state.score.

Instead, when the server returns colorsEarned that doesn't match
the current score (stale data from a swapped puzzle), the client
overrides tapeResult with locally computed colors. This ensures
both displays are correct immediately, while the tapeService fix
handles the DB cleanup on the next fresh page load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Improve site performance: add caching, preloading, and deploy config

- Add vercel.json with aggressive cache headers for static assets (1 year)
- Add .vercelignore to exclude 60MB+ of unnecessary files from deploy
- Preload hero video and poster image for faster above-the-fold render
- Increase HTML cache max-age

commit.message:
Midday dashboard rebuild 2026-03-09

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update website docs and homepage: fix API port, add features, expand examples

- Fix default port from 3000 to 7741 across all docs pages
- Fix auth env var from JERIKO_TOKEN to NODE_AUTH_SECRET
- Add 3 feature cards: Persistent Memory, Vision & Screenshots, Full HTTP API
- Add missing OAuth providers (HubSpot, Shopify, Instagram, Threads)
- Add once trigger type, compaction SSE event, 502 status code
- Fix billing plan/checkout/portal response shapes to match actual API
- Fix channel response shape (object keyed by name, not array)
- Fix session response shape (timestamps as numbers, added fields)
- Add JavaScript and Python code examples to all endpoint pages
- Add WSL to install label
- Update legal pages
